clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Determine BP treatment thresholds based on CVD risk stratification to guide medication initiation
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Initial hypertension diagnosis, CVD risk assessment, treatment decision point
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: BP medication initiation threshold selection based on patient risk profile (clinical CVD, diabetes, CKD, PREVENT risk score)

navigationPath.purpose: Entry point for BP treatment decision
Collect clinical CVD status, diabetes, CKD history
Calculate or input 10-year CVD risk score
Input average SBP and DBP readings
Track 3-6 month lifestyle trial if applicable
Apply COR/LOE logic to patient data

preventRiskScore.description: 10-year CVD risk percentage based on PREVENT

validationRules: If no clinical CVD, diabetes, or CKD, PREVENT risk score required
Lifestyle intervention duration valid only if 10-year risk <7.5%

rules: If clinical CVD present: use SBP ≥130 or DBP ≥80 thresholds
If no clinical CVD: check diabetes or CKD status
If diabetes or CKD present: use SBP ≥130 or DBP ≥80 thresholds
If no clinical CVD, diabetes, or CKD: use PREVENT 10-year risk score
If PREVENT risk ≥7.5%: use SBP ≥130 or DBP ≥80 thresholds
If PREVENT risk <7.5%: use SBP ≥130 or DBP ≥80 ONLY after 3-6 months lifestyle intervention
Otherwise use SBP ≥140 or DBP ≥90 thresholds for general population
Apply corresponding COR and LOE based on patient category

patientCategories.category: Adults with hypertension AND clinical CVD
Adults with hypertension AND diabetes or CKD or PREVENT ≥7.5%
Adults with hypertension, PREVENT <7.5%, no CVD/diabetes/CKD

category.description: Patient risk category (e.g., 'Clinical CVD', 'High CVD Risk ≥7.5%', 'Low CVD Risk <7.5%')

loe.description: Level of Evidence (A, B-R, B-NR, C-LD, C-EO)

requiresLifestyleIntervention.description: True if 3-6 month lifestyle trial needed first

preventRiskScoreUsed.description: True if PREVENT risk score was applied

thresholds.sbp: N/A - treatment initiation thresholds are lower than crisis thresholds

escalationLogic.ifAnySymptomPresent: N/A - this module addresses chronic treatment initiation, not acute crisis

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Initiate BP-lowering medication based on recommended threshold
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Reassess BP in 4 weeks after medication initiation; recalculate PREVENT risk annually
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm elevated BP with multiple readings before treatment initiation
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag patients meeting treatment thresholds for care team notification
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log treatment initiation decision, COR/LOE, and PREVENT risk score to health record
